heading: Report to the Congress
label: 1928c Report to the Congress
text: The United States Group of the NATO Parliamentary Assembly shall submit to the Congress a report for each fiscal year for which an appropriation is made, including its expenditures under such appropriation.
notes: CodificationThis section was not enacted as part of the Mutual Security Act of 1954 which comprises this chapter.

Amendments1999— substituted “NATO Parliamentary Assembly” for “North Atlantic Assembly”.Pub. L. 106–1131967— substituted “North Atlantic Assembly” for “North Atlantic Treaty Parliamentary Conference”.Pub. L. 90–137
